title: ghosting
body:
))}}

))}}

[▶︎ cashews | bjorn vader](https://bjornvader.bandcamp.com/track/cashews)

))}}

i know what it's like to feel hunted
attention unwanted
look there goes that one kid
i'm haunted
i guess you could it a double conscious if you lacked perspective
i only ever wanted to feel collected connected to my environment
that's why i am
absurd
words stacked on words
every version preferred serves the tongue of the lord
wonders abound
miracles no end to be found
i'm looking around
like did everyone forget we live underground
these are all shadows
every edge we cut something outta
every line we hold to battle
did the world shake or just my legs
could we read the rattles to each other then talk about em
some people rather preach and prattle
to each ir own
but one thing i've learned
if you can't see my frame
i'm not safe around ya
it took me a long time to stop losing my own shadow life figures
peter panning the camera kept me mostly outta bright windows
better lighting is nice but who's providing my fixtures
writing the line between fact and fiction
like a border patrol, what's that agenda
what sorta control comes from pretending
the word is real but not the silence it's ending
the sword is steel but not the violence intended
i'm sure there's more to the story
that's why i'm always inventing
from pure toy to tortured allegory
for joy and for alimony
for instance i've noticed rebirth always happens after the dirt piles on me
at the same time i know that exactly one time that might not be true
in between those two extremes i'm so pleased to meet you
